Safe and Sound In protocol (SSP) providers. Provides intervention services to batterers and support to survivors, as well as therapeutic services for children and youth who have been impacted by divorce and/or domestic violence. Offers supervised visitation and parenting classes. 921 Country Club Road Suite 222 Eugene, OR 97401 Eligibility: Unrestricted, but cannot work with sex offender population Hours: Monday/Tuesday/Thursday 9am-6pm, Wednesday 9:15am-5pm (541) 686-6000 Get Directions Visit Website More Details FAMILY BUILDING BLOCKS JEANETTE'S PLACE FAMILY MENTAL HEALTH PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides safe spaces where families can build healthy relationships by accessing behavioral health services such as individual and family psychotherapy, psychotherapy groups, and play therapy. 1787 State Street NE Salem, OR 97301 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: By appointment only (503) 566-2132 Get Directions Visit Website More Details JACKSON COUNTY MENTAL HEALTH PARENT CHILD INTERACTIVE THERAPY Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides short-term, specialized behavior management in order to assist in managing difficult behaviors including, but not limited to, tantrums, separation anxiety, developmental concerns (such as autism or language problems), histories of trauma, property destruction, and parent-child relationship problems. The program requires weekly appointments and typically lasts 18-24 weeks. 140 S Holly Street Medford, OR 97501 Eligibility: Ages 1-10 who display challenging behaviors and their parents (biological, foster/resource, or adoptive), grandparents, legal guardians, or kinship caregivers Hours: Phone hours: Monday-Friday 8am-noon and 1pm-5pm Classes: No standard hours Email (541) 774-3333 Get Directions Visit Website More Details LIFEWORKS NW LIFEWORKS NW BEAVERTON PARENT-CHILD INTERACTIVE THERAPY Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF The Parent-Child Interactive Therapy (PCIT) program provides mental health assessment and treatment to children (2-7) and their families.
